vehicle.label: Small Launch Vehicle (sounding)
vehicle.desc: Saturn V-structured, Electron-class 2-stage smallsat launcher demonstrator

parts.spec: Non-functional stage_engine_mock with bell_nozzle_shell, cutaway_window, engine_display_cartridge slide_rail, educational label only

requirements: Combustion chamber dummy, bell nozzle shell, turbopump assembly dummy, impeller dummy, stage engine mock, cutaway window, slide rail

risk.mit: Ensure proper strain relief and adherence to minimum bend radius guidelines

physics_paths.description: Educational display path showing non-functional combustion chamber dummy, bell nozzle shell, and turbopump assembly dummy.
Cutaway window provides visibility into the interior of the bell nozzle shell, including the engine display cartridge.
Removable engine display cartridge accessed via cutaway window and slide rails.

integration_opportunities.description: Service access for maintenance and inspection through cutaway window.
Removable engine display cartridge allows for easy replacement or upgrade of the display components.
Data access points for educational purposes, allowing users to interact with the display system.

verification_focus.description: Verify that the bell_nozzle_shell does not exceed the mass budget of 500g.
Ensure that the bell_nozzle_shell maintains structural integrity under simulated launch conditions.
Check that the bolted and snap-fit interfaces are repeatable and secure during assembly.
